channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 59/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 10.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Keir Starmer hits out at Elon Musk for ‘trying to whip up division’ in UK over Henry Nowak’s murder
item.description: Keir Starmer hits out at Elon Musk for ‘trying to whip up division’ in UK over Henry Nowak’s murder

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Makerfield by-election debate live: Burnham and Reform’s controversy-hit Kenyon to face off in first hustings

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer to meet Henry Nowak’s family this afternoon, No 10 says – UK politics live

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Reform UK raising millions more than other parties, donation figures show

item.title: i Politics: Triple lock pension must go, former Labour Cabinet minister admits
